positive: A minimalist, highly stylized geometric pattern depicting abstract constellations and mythical beasts merging into vibrant space dust. The primary motif should be stylized mountain peaks and lunar phases. Use a limited palette of deep indigo, ethereal teal, metallic gold, and off-white. The style should be linocut mixed with modern sacred geometry, creating strong, clean silhouettes and stark contrast. Composition must be highly symmetrical and scalable, perfect for all-over apparel print. Lighting should be dramatic and celestial, emphasizing negative space. Vector graphic quality, suitable for screen printing.
negative: blur, text, watermark, noise, logo, signature, writing, low quality, bad anatomy, extra limbs, artifacts, smudges, graffiti, realistic photography, cartoon, sketch, messy, busy background
